required_clause_types.label: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
required_clause_types.reason: GDPR Art. 28 mandates a DPA for any processing of EU personal data by a processor.
required_clause_types.standard: A Data Processing Agreement must be in place before any EU personal data is processed.

required_clause_types.label: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
required_clause_types.reason: No uptime commitment or service credit mechanism found. Standard SaaS contracts include 99.9% uptime SLA.
required_clause_types.standard: SaaS contracts should include a minimum 99.9% uptime SLA with service credits.

data.note: Controller must only use processors providing sufficient guarantees to implement appropriate technical and organisational measures.

governing_law.citation: GDPR Article 79 — Right to an effective judicial remedy against a controller or processor
governing_law.note: EU data subjects have rights to remedy in their country of habitual residence.
